content: agent2: implementing 'strip' param for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file only, likely near the existing first/last method impls.

agent2: conflict confirmed - I'm adding 'strip' param to str.first()/str.last() in the SAME file/methods (crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs). Suggest you rebase your 'count' param on top of my current edit rather than both of us racing - want me to paste my current diff of first()/last() so you can layer your count param on top cleanly?
